query:
SELECT 
  orderFrom,
  outletName,
  COUNT(*) as order_count,
  SUM(subtotal)/100 as subtotal_rupees,
  SUM(cgst)/100 as cgst_rupees,
  SUM(sgst)/100 as sgst_rupees,
  SUM(tax)/100 as tax_rupees
FROM petpooja_webhook_orders 
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-04-01' 
  AND createdAt < '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY orderFrom, outletName
ORDER BY outletName, orderFrom;
